cloud.description: Cloud provider — selects EC2NodeClass (aws), AKSNodeClass (azure), or standalone ComputeClass CRs (gcp).

propertyNames.description: Must be a valid Kubernetes resource name (becomes ComputeClass metadata.name).

additionalProperties.description: Must be an object, not null -- reject computeClasses.<name>: null.

osDiskSizeGB.description: Azure only. Numeric GB — reject strings like "256Gi".

kubelet.description: Must be a map — reject booleans/strings like kubelet: true.
